title: machilus pyramidalis
intro: Machilus pyramidalis, also known as the Chinese boxwood or Chinese box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Machilus pyramidalis include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Machilus pyramidalis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water.
